problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations may resolve Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
